content: Community consensus (Laracasts/Medium/dev.to, cross-checked against official docs) confirms the standard, un-packaged Laravel pattern for a fixed-choice status/reason field is a native backed enum cast via casts() (e.g. enum EnrollmentStatus: string { case Enrolled; case Withdrawn; case Rejected; }), and for status living on a pivot/join table, belongsToMany(...)->withPivot('status')->using(CustomPivot::class) with the enum cast declared on the custom Pivot model. No package (spatie/enum, spatie/laravel-permission, etc.) appears in any current guidance for this shape — it is treated as a solved problem with native PHP 8.1+ backed enums plus Eloquent's built-in enum casting.
